data.content: Needs changes: 1. The branch fails the required typecheck gate because src/lib/__tests__/scope-refinement-worker.test.ts uses invalid EventEmitter casts at lines 42 and 77. 2. drainScopeRefinementQueue() removes a job before processing and processScopeRefinementJob() returns on load/agent/parse/update failures without retry or requeue, so failed refinements are lost (src/lib/scope-refinement-worker.ts:240-299). 3. runScopeRefinementPrompt() treats any exit-code-0 result as success and does not inspect normalized result error metadata, so agent failures can be misclassified as parse failures and then dropped (src/lib/scope-refinement-worker.ts:168-195).
